Alt. of Ye
an old method of printing the article the (AS. /e), the "y" being
used in place of the Anglo-Saxon thorn (/). It is sometimes incorrectly
pronounced ye. See The, and Thorn, n., 4.
n. An eye.
pron. The plural of the pronoun of the second person in the
nominative case.
adv. Yea; yes.

entries.d: plural of yee

Term used to express excitement; especially used in basketball when someone has shot a three-pointer that they are sure will go in the hoop. \r
Also used as one ejaculates.\r
Can be used as an exclamatory (YEET!), or a verb (to yeet someone)
> "AHH YEET!!" exclaimed LaMarcus as his shot went toward the hoop.

Slang referring to the rapper Kanye West
> Guy 1: What the hell is this?
> Guy 2: This is yeezy's new track.
